title: What Language/Web Platform was Monday.com built it?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I just signed up for Monday.com today and I can’t find any words to describe how beautiful and responsive the UI is.  It’s really a masterpiece! 
Can you share what language/platform monday.com was built in? 
Thanks…

posts.author: sensolyzer (senoly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I just signed up for Monday.com today and I can’t find any words to describe how beautiful and responsive the UI is. It’s really a masterpiece!

Can you share what language/platform monday.com was built in?

Thanks!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sensolyzer,

Thank you so much! We’re so glad to hear you’re loving our UI.

Our platform is created mostly with Javascript and React. If you haven’t yet, feel free to check out our Storybook UI components here.

I hope this helps .
